description: The ReScript compiler, build toolchain, and standard library for typed JavaScript.
rules: This repository context is focused on the ReScript standard library and repository-local documentation, not compiler internals, parser implementation, build-system internals, or contributor workflow docs.

For ReScript language manual pages, syntax guidance, React documentation, ecosystem documentation, and other website-hosted docs outside this repository, also consult https://rescript-lang.org/llms.txt.
